Business Name: CAT Scale at TA Express Atkins
Description: CAT scale located at the TA Express Atkins travel center at I-40 Exit 101 (Blackwell exit). Scale installed with the new facility that opened in March 2024; open 24/7 with the travel center.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 107 in Morrilton. 4 diesel lanes, bulk DEF, roughly 17-20 truck parking spaces, 3 showers, Subway and Godfather's Pizza on site, convenience store, ATM and WiFi.

Independent 24-hour Shell-branded truck stop at the Morgan interchange (I-40 Exit 142). Paved overnight truck parking (sources report 35-50 spaces), 4 fuel lanes, certified truck scales (not CAT), convenience store with Chester's Chicken and deli, truckers lounge, ATM; McDonald's and Waffle House adjacent.

24-hour independent truck stop on AR-365 at the Morgan interchange (I-40 Exit 142), across from the Morgan Shell. Free truck parking, showers, convenience store with restaurant/deli, ATM. Some listings show the location under RoadRunner branding; verify signage on arrival.

Dedicated paid truck and trailer parking lot in Conway on Harkrider Street (US-65B) near I-40 Exit 125. Fully fenced gravel yard with 24/7 gated access via personalized gate code, security cameras, and daily, weekly and monthly rates for tractor-trailers, bobtails, box trucks and trailers. Bookable through Truck Parking Club.

Fixed-location commercial tire shop on AR-365 in Mayflower, just off I-40 Exit 135. Handles semi truck and trailer tires with sales, flat repair and mounting, plus mechanical services; shop hours Mon-Fri 8-5, Sat 9-2, with 24-hour emergency roadside tire service also offered from this location.

Best Western hotel on Oak Street (US-64) just off I-40 Exit 127 in Conway. Property amenity listings include free RV/truck parking with a large lot able to accommodate a truck with trailer; free breakfast, WiFi, outdoor pool and fitness center.

Budget motel on N Oak Street (AR-95) at I-40 Exit 107 in Morrilton, a short walk from the Love's Travel Stop. Free parking lot with room for semis, trailers and refrigerated trucks per property and guest-review listings; 24-hour front desk, guest laundry and free WiFi.

Business Name: Little Rock Truck Parking - Conway Lot
Description: HELD: Operator advertises a secure gated Conway lot 0.5 miles from I-40 Exit 125 with about 40 spaces, lighting, 24/7 access and rates from $20/day, but publishes no street address; only operator-controlled sources found. Possible overlap with the Hendricks Harkrider Street lot could not be ruled out.

HELD: Directory listings place a Mapco Express fuel stop with 3 diesel lanes, DEF, deli and about 10 overnight truck spaces at I-40 Exit 129 in Conway, and the Arkansas DEQ facility record shows 'Active', but no source could confirm the store is currently operating under this brand in 2025-2026 (a nearby Conway Mapco Mart shows CLOSED on some listings). Needs a current-status check before publishing.

HELD: Third-party rest-area directories list state truck-parking turnouts on I-40 at mile 134 (both directions) between Mayflower and Conway with no facilities. Publication requires an official Arkansas source (ardot.gov) plus a civic address; the ARDOT rest-area PDF could not be retrieved and no civic address exists for a highway turnout.

HELD: Listed in one truck-service directory as a Conway I-40 shop offering truck/trailer tire repair, new/used/recap tires, oil changes and minor repairs, but only a single source was found and no street address or current-operation confirmation.

24/7 AmBest travel center at I-40 Exit 35 (AR-23/Pence Lane) in Ozark, formerly known as The I-40 Travel Center, with two on-site restaurants (including the Hillbilly Hideout), showers, laundry, CAT scales, truck repair, DEF at the pump, and 24-hour security. Sources report roughly 80 truck parking spaces and 8 diesel lanes.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 37 (AR-219) in Ozark with 4 diesel fuel lanes, 3 showers, Subway fast food, trucker store, bulk DEF, certified scales, and a lighted paved parking lot. Sources report differing truck parking counts (11-19 spaces), so no count is published.

24-hour independent truck stop and convenience store on US-71 at I-40 Exit 13 in Alma, with fuel, ATM, and truck parking in a lighted paved lot. RV parking is also available, with restaurants and a motel nearby.

Independent 24-hour truck stop about 0.3 miles from I-40 Exit 20 near Mulberry, known for its restaurant serving both authentic Indian cuisine and American fare. Facilities include about 20 truck parking spots, 5 fuel lanes, 2 showers, 24-hour diesel, deli, ATM, and truckers lounge.
24-hour truck wash at I-40 Exit 5 (Fayetteville Rd/AR-59) in Van Buren, in business for over 35 years. Washes everything from small vehicles to diesel rigs and washes out most trailers.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Workman's Travel Center
Description: CAT scale located at Workman's Travel Center at I-40 Exit 35 (AR-23) in Ozark. Confirmed by the travel center's own amenity listing and the AllStays CAT scale directory for Arkansas.

Fixed heavy-duty truck facility on US-64 (Alma Hwy) near I-40 Exit 13 in Alma offering 24/7 heavy-duty towing and recovery, truck repair, and new/used truck parts and wrecker equipment. Shop hours are 8am-5pm Monday-Friday; Wreckmaster certified.

Truck and trailer repair company with a full shop facility on US-64 (Alma Hwy) near I-40 Exit 13 in Alma, plus 24/7 roadside service. Services include DOT inspections, mechanical/electrical/AC repairs, brakes, suspensions, welding, and new and used tire sales and service; shop hours 9am-5pm Monday-Friday, with Detroit Diesel factory-trained technicians.
48-room hotel on US-71 at I-40 Exit 13 in Alma with explicitly advertised free RV/bus/truck parking on site. Also offers free WiFi and free grab-and-go breakfast.
31-room budget motel off I-40 Exit 35 and US-64 in Ozark that explicitly lists truck and bus parking among its amenities. Also offers continental breakfast and pet-friendly rooms.

Business Name: Arkansas Welcome Center at Van Buren/Fort Smith (I-40 EB, MM 2)
